outcome.rationale:
=== CLIENT INFORMATION ===
Client Name: Residential Property Ltd
Risk Rating: MEDIUM
Business Sector: Real Estate Investment
PEP Status: No
Purchase Amount: £450,000.00 GBP
Purchase Description: Purchase of commercial property / business acquisition
Expected Payment Date: 2024-01-15

=== SOURCE OF FUNDS ANALYSIS ===
✅ BANK PAYMENT STATUS: Incoming payments found covering 100% of purchase amount.
⚠️ DOCUMENTATION STATUS: Corroborating source documents REQUIRED to prove legitimacy.
   Bank payments alone are INSUFFICIENT for AML compliance.

CLAIM-BY-CLAIM ANALYSIS:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CLAIM                     | EVIDENCE FOUND                      | OUTREACH QUESTIONS             | SUMMARY             
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
inheritance £250,000      | ✅ Bank: 2023-08-20: £250,000 | ⚠️ Doc: probate_grant_2023_8...5.pdf (60%) | Verify amount in document      | ⚠️ Review doc       
property_sale £200,000    | ✅ Bank: 2023-09-10: £200,000 | ⚠️ Doc: completion_statement..._.pdf (66%) | Verify amount in document      | ⚠️ Review doc       
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SOURCE OF FUNDS SUMMARY:
❌ CRITICAL: No claims could be directly verified against the bank statements provided. This represents a complete absence of documentary evidence for the stated funding sources. Without bank statement evidence showing the receipt of these funds, we cannot proceed under UK AML regulations. Immediate action required.

FUNDING PATH TRACED:
  • £250,000.00 received into Unknown on 2023-08-20
  • £200,000.00 received into Unknown on 2023-09-10


=== AUTOMATED TRANSACTION REVIEW ===
✅ OVERALL STATUS: No transaction alerts identified.

TRANSACTION REVIEW SUMMARY:
The automated transaction monitoring has not identified any AML/CTF concerns in the transaction data reviewed. This is a positive indicator, though it does not replace the requirement for proper SoF documentation.


=== FINAL ASSESSMENT ===

⚠️ DECISION: BORDERLINE

The current evidence is borderline sufficient. While core funding has been traced and no critical AML alerts exist, some documentation gaps or medium-priority concerns should be addressed to strengthen the file. The matter may proceed with enhanced monitoring, or additional documentation can be requested to achieve a 'sufficient' rating.

documents: Estate account summary showing distribution (for inheritance claim)
Solicitor's statement of account showing sale proceeds (for property_sale claim)
Complete bank statements covering receipt and payment periods
Certified copies of photo ID and proof of address

SOURCE OF FUNDS ASSESSMENT
Date: 21 January 2026
Matter: 1
Client: Residential Property Ltd
Risk Rating: MEDIUM
Purchase: Purchase of commercial property / business acquisition - £450,000.00 GBP


CLIENT'S SoF EXPLANATION:
- inheritance: £250,000.00 [REQUIRES DOCUMENTATION]
- property_sale: £200,000.00 [REQUIRES DOCUMENTATION]

EVIDENCE REVIEW (Claim-by-Claim):
Bank transactions: 2/2 claims matched.
Supporting documents: 0/2 claims verified with source documentation.
FULLY VERIFIED (bank + docs + 100% confidence): 0/2 claims.

⚠️ Claim 1 (inheritance): £250,000.00 - REQUIRES REVIEW
   • Bank Transaction: £250,000.00 on 2023-08-20
   • Description: Transfer from Estate Executors - Margaret Elizabeth Thompson
   • Counterparty: 
   • ⚠️ REQUIRES: Source documentation to prove legitimacy

⚠️ Claim 2 (property_sale): £200,000.00 - REQUIRES REVIEW
   • Bank Transaction: £200,000.00 on 2023-09-10
   • Description: Property Sale - 78 Victoria Road Brighton
   • Counterparty: 
   • ⚠️ REQUIRES: Source documentation to prove legitimacy


FUNDING ANALYSIS (Overall Position):
Total funding traced: 100% of purchase amount.

INTERPRETATION: While not all individual claims have direct evidence in the provided statements, sufficient aggregate funding has been traced to cover the full purchase amount. This may indicate:
  • Some source transactions occurred before the statement period
  • Funds arrived via intermediate accounts not yet documented
  • Alternative credits provide equivalent funding coverage

Recommendation: Request specific documentation for unverified claims to complete the audit trail, even though funding is mathematically sufficient.

Funding path analysis:
  • £250,000.00 received into Unknown on 2023-08-20
  • £200,000.00 received into Unknown on 2023-09-10

outcome.rationale:
=== CLIENT INFORMATION ===
Client Name: Property Investors Group
Risk Rating: MEDIUM
Business Sector: Real Estate Investment
PEP Status: No
Purchase Amount: £620,000.00 GBP
Purchase Description: Purchase of commercial property / business acquisition
Expected Payment Date: 2024-01-15

=== SOURCE OF FUNDS ANALYSIS ===
✅ BANK PAYMENT STATUS: Incoming payments found covering 96% of purchase amount.
⚠️ DOCUMENTATION STATUS: Corroborating source documents REQUIRED to prove legitimacy.
   Bank payments alone are INSUFFICIENT for AML compliance.

CLAIM-BY-CLAIM ANALYSIS:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CLAIM                     | EVIDENCE FOUND                      | OUTREACH QUESTIONS             | SUMMARY             
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
property_sale £400,000    | ✅ Bank: 2023-08-25: £385,000 | ⚠️ Doc: completion_statement..._.pdf (50%) | Verify amount in document      | ⚠️ Review doc       
savings £220,000          | ✅ Bank: 2023-09-05: £215,000 | ❌ No doc | Request historical statements  | ⚠️ Bank txn, need doc
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SOURCE OF FUNDS SUMMARY:
❌ CRITICAL: No claims could be directly verified against the bank statements provided. This represents a complete absence of documentary evidence for the stated funding sources. Without bank statement evidence showing the receipt of these funds, we cannot proceed under UK AML regulations. Immediate action required.

FUNDING PATH TRACED:
  • £385,000.00 received into Unknown on 2023-08-25
  • £215,000.00 received into Unknown on 2023-09-05


=== AUTOMATED TRANSACTION REVIEW ===

⚠️ OVERALL STATUS: 2 alert(s) identified by automated monitoring:
  • 1 CRITICAL severity
  • 1 HIGH severity
  • 0 MEDIUM severity

ALERT ANALYSIS:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SEVERITY     | ISSUE IDENTIFIED                              | OUTREACH QUESTIONS                  | SUMMARY             
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🔴 CRITICAL   | 1 transaction(s) involving prohibited/sanctio | Explain all sanctioned transactions | ❌ BLOCKS COMPLETION 
🟠 HIGH       | 1 high-risk jurisdiction transaction(s)       | Explain business purpose and parties | ⚠️ REQUIRES REVIEW  
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

TRANSACTION REVIEW SUMMARY:
❌ CRITICAL AML CONCERNS: The automated transaction monitoring has identified 1 CRITICAL-severity alerts that represent material AML/CTF risks. These include:
  • 1 transaction(s) involving prohibited/sanctioned jurisdictions
  • 1 large cash transaction(s) identified

These findings materially impact the overall assessment. Even with complete SoF documentation, CRITICAL transaction alerts indicate potential sanctions violations, terrorism financing, or other prohibited activities. Under UK AML regulations, we cannot proceed until these concerns are fully investigated and resolved. The matter must be escalated to the MLRO for review.

ADDITIONAL RED FLAGS:
  • [CRITICAL] Transaction to sanctioned jurisdiction: Iran - £50,000.00 on 2023-08-22
  • [HIGH] Large cash transaction: £15,000.00 - £15,000.00 on 2023-08-23
  • [MEDIUM] Large unexplained credit of £25,000.00 on 2023-09-01 in ****5678


=== FINAL ASSESSMENT ===

❌ DECISION: INSUFFICIENT

The current evidence is insufficient to proceed. Material gaps in SoF documentation and/or critical AML concerns prevent completion under UK regulatory requirements. The specific issues identified above must be resolved before the matter can proceed.

questions: URGENT: Transaction of £50,000.00 on 2023-08-22 flagged as CRITICAL - Transaction to sanctioned jurisdiction: Iran. Provide immediate explanation.
HIGH RISK: Transaction of £15,000.00 on 2023-08-23 requires explanation - Large cash transaction: £15,000.00.
documents: Written explanation and supporting evidence for all transactions to sanctioned/prohibited countries
Source documentation for all cash transactions over £10,000
Solicitor's statement of account showing sale proceeds (for property_sale claim)
Historical bank statements showing savings accumulation (for savings claim)
Complete bank statements covering receipt and payment periods
Certified copies of photo ID and proof of address
